/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libps3rp.so -o libps3rp.so CMakeFiles/ps3rp.dir/src/ps3rp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ps3rp.dir/src/base64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ps3rp.dir/src/auth_crypto_isolated.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ps3rp.dir/src/stream_crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ps3rp.dir/src/ps3rp_jni.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
